calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-01-2018 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2018 Set For Trial On Nov-05-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2017 Continued To Jan-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Afshin Sazegari, plaintiff, appears to oppose the motion

Attorney, Steven A. Kronenberg of the law offices of The Veen Firm (415-673-4800) appears as counsel for plaintiff, moving to be relieved as counsel of record

The courtroom is cleared and a confidential hearing is conducted. The court hears from client and counsel as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The transcript is ordered sealed as confidential pending further order of court.

ATTORNEY Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel of Record for PLAINTIFFS AFSHIN SAZEGARI, FATEMEH RAMEZANI is granted, effective December 1, 2017. Court issues other orders with both counsel present. Plaintiff parties shall have until December 15, 2017 to either produce discovery responses or file a motion for protective order.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org. (L&M302)
